materials: 1 skein of Mandala yarn of your choice
Crochet hook size G or 4.25 mm

rounds.title: Foundation Chain
rounds.summary: Create a foundation chain of 17 stitches.

rounds.title: Row 1
rounds.rawInstruction: Sc in 2nd ch from hook and in next 2 chs. Hdc in next ch, dc in next 8 chains. Hdc in next ch. Sc in last 3 chains. Turn (16)
rounds.summary: Work single crochet, half double crochet, double crochet, half double crochet, and single crochet across the foundation chain.

rounds.title: Rows 2-109
rounds.rawInstruction: Ch 1, sc in first 3 sts. Hdc in next st. dc in next 8 sts. Hdc in next st. sc in last 3 sts.
rounds.summary: Repeat the established stitch pattern for rows 2 through 109.

rounds.title: Finish off and sew the 2 ends together
rounds.rawInstruction: Finish off and sew the 2 ends together.
rounds.summary: Fasten off the yarn and sew the two ends of the piece together to form a loop.

rounds.title: Weave in all ends
rounds.summary: Weave in all loose yarn ends.
